---
title: "Week 06"
---

::: {style="color: #F66D7A"}
### Monday (3/16)
:::

**Topics**

-   Variance

**Daily assignment**

To be completed and submitted to Canvas by 9:00am

-   [Daily assignment](daily/DA_15.pdf)

**Class activity**

-   Class activity

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {style="color: #F66D7A"}
### Wednesday (3/18)
:::

-   Poisson distribution
-   Poisson paradigm

**Daily assignment**

To be completed and submitted to Canvas by 9:00am

-   Daily assignment

**Class activity**

-   Class activity

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {style="color: #F66D7A"}
### Friday (3/20)
:::

**Topics**

-   Continuous random variables
-   Uniform

**Daily assignment**

To be completed and submitted to Canvas by 9:00am

-   Daily assignment

**Class activity**

-   Class activity
